title: solidago glutinosa var. racemosa
intro: Solidago glutinosa var. racemosa, also known as rough-stemmed goldenrod, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the aster family and is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Solidago glutinosa var. racemosa include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb for those suffering from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Solidago glutinosa var. racemosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
